hooks.command: bash -c 'IN=$(cat); H=.claude/hooks/block-no-verify.sh; R="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; [ -f "$R/$H" ] || R=$(git -C "$(printf %s "$IN" | jq -r .cwd)" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); [ -f "$R/$H" ] || { echo "block-no-verify: hook script unresolvable — failing closed" >&2; exit 2; }; printf %s "$IN" | CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$R" bash "$R/$H"'

bash -c 'IN=$(cat); H=.claude/hooks/block-release-please-files.sh; R="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; [ -f "$R/$H" ] || R=$(git -C "$(printf %s "$IN" | jq -r .cwd)" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); [ -f "$R/$H" ] || { echo "block-release-please-files: hook script unresolvable — failing closed" >&2; exit 2; }; printf %s "$IN" | CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$R" bash "$R/$H"'

bash -c 'IN=$(cat); H=.claude/hooks/cargo-check-crate.sh; R="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; [ -f "$R/$H" ] || R=$(git -C "$(printf %s "$IN" | jq -r .cwd)" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); [ -f "$R/$H" ] || { echo "cargo-check-crate: hook script unresolvable — skipping (advisory)" >&2; exit 1; }; printf %s "$IN" | CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$R" bash "$R/$H"'

bash -c 'IN=$(cat); H=.claude/hooks/pre-stop-gate.sh; R="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; [ -f "$R/$H" ] || R=$(git -C "$(printf %s "$IN" | jq -r .cwd)" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); [ -f "$R/$H" ] || { echo "pre-stop-gate: hook script unresolvable — gate did not run" >&2; exit 1; }; printf %s "$IN" | CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$R" bash "$R/$H"'
